title: Stealing Foundation
content:
Stealing Foundation
 is a technique used to raise one's Cultivation to 
Foundation Establishment
 by stealing the Foundation of someone else.

Process
[
]

The process requires both a user and a victim. As it's unlikely the victim will be willing, they most likely will need to be forcibly restrained. The user summons a mist which enters the victim's body and is used to refine said body bit by bit, starting with the blood and blood vessels, then the muscles and meat, then the bones, all of which will separate violently from the victim's body and form a fist sized ball. The victim cannot be allowed to die up until this point. After that the user needs to refine the victim's spirit roots and soul. Refining the soul is quite hard, as it needs to be removed without damaging it. If it is damaged, the process will not fail, but the user will not be able to use the victim's spirit root to improve his own. Once refined, the soul will also form a fist sized sphere. The spirit root will then emerge from the victim's remains, most will dissipate and a lot of what remains will try to reject the user, but they can be consumed to improve the user's spirit root regardless. The refined soul will then start to be absorbed into the user as the blood helts into the spirit and the meat and bone shrink into the fog to form a ring. The user then places the soul into the ring, uses hisown blood to refine it, and absorbs it into his own body. After this, the process will be complete and the user will break through to Foundation Establishment.
